sneakernet.ticket.not_container: You must look at a container that can store items to export items!
sneakernet.ticket.no_trusted_servers: No trusted servers configured. Use /sneakernet trust to add servers first.
sneakernet.ticket.export_hint: The voucher is saved locally. It is valid for %s. Log in to the target server and use /sneakernet import to redeem the package before it expires.
sneakernet.ticket.no_target: Please bind a target server first with /sneakernet bind. You can use /sneakernet serverlist to view the server list.
sneakernet.package.no_data: This package has no item data!
sneakernet.package.no_space: No space to place container here!
sneakernet.package.name: SneakerNet Package (%s)
sneakernet.keygen.success: New ECC key pair generated. Key ID: %s
sneakernet.keygen.trusted_self: This server has been automatically trusted as: %s
sneakernet.keygen.pubkey_hint: This server's public key (click the text below to copy; share it so others can trust this server with /sneakernet trustkey):
sneakernet.keygen.pubkey_copy_tooltip: Click to copy public key to clipboard
sneakernet.pubkey.info: Current server public key. Key ID: %s
sneakernet.rename.not_found: Server '%s' not found in trusted list.
sneakernet.untrust.not_found: Server not found in trusted list: %s
sneakernet.import.no_vouchers: No voucher files found in sneakernet/vouchers/ directory.
sneakernet.bind.not_found: Server '%s' not found in trusted list. Use /sneakernet serverlist to see available servers.
sneakernet.bind.success: Bound to server: %s. Now you can use SneakerNet Ticket to export items to this server.
sneakernet.bind.not_bound: You haven't bound any server yet.
sneakernet.help.cmd.serverlist: View the list of trusted server names
sneakernet.help.cmd.bind: Bind a target server (required before using a Ticket); arg is the server name
sneakernet.help.cmd.bind_clear: Clear the current target server binding
sneakernet.help.cmd.import: Import local client vouchers into package items (optional filename for a single one)
sneakernet.help.cmd.keygen: Generate/update this server's key pair, auto-trust self and print a copyable public key
sneakernet.help.cmd.pubkey: Show the current public key in chat, click to copy (does not regenerate the key)
sneakernet.help.cmd.showpub: Export this server's public key to a JSON file for exchange
sneakernet.help.cmd.trust: Import trust from a public key JSON file; args are server name and file name
sneakernet.help.cmd.trustkey: Trust a server by entering its public key directly; args are server name and public key (Base64)
sneakernet.help.cmd.rename: Rename a trusted server; args are old name and new name
sneakernet.help.cmd.untrust: Remove a trusted server; arg is the server name
sneakernet.help.cmd.list: List detailed info (KeyID, fingerprint) of all trusted servers
sneakernet.message.inventory_full: Inventory full, items dropped on the ground
